scenarios.name: 友だち追加シナリオ（初回クーポン）
scenarios.description: 友だち追加後に初回購入クーポン配信

steps.messageContent: {"type":"bubble","hero":{"type":"image","url":"__SHOP_IMAGE_URL__","size":"full","aspectRatio":"20:13"},"body":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"友だち追加ありがとうございます!","weight":"bold","size":"lg","wrap":true},{"type":"text","text":"__SHOP_NAME__です。\nLINE限定クーポンをプレゼント!","size":"sm","color":"#666666","margin":"md","wrap":true},{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","margin":"lg","backgroundColor":"#ECFDF5","cornerRadius":"md","paddingAll":"16px","contents":[{"type":"text","text":"初回購入限定","weight":"bold","color":"#065F46"},{"type":"text","text":"__FIRST_ORDER_COUPON__","size":"xl","weight":"bold","color":"#059669","margin":"sm"},{"type":"text","text":"クーポンコード: __COUPON_CODE__","size":"sm","color":"#065F46","margin":"sm"},{"type":"text","text":"有効期限: __COUPON_EXPIRY__","size":"xs","color":"#064E3B","margin":"sm"}]}]},"footer":{"type":"box","layout":"vertical","spacing":"sm","contents":[{"type":"button","action":{"type":"uri","label":"今すぐショップへ","uri":"__SHOP_URL__"},"style":"primary","color":"#059669"},{"type":"button","action":{"type":"message","label":"人気商品を見る","text":"人気商品を見る"},"style":"secondary"}]}}

こんにちは、__SHOP_NAME__です!

初回クーポンはもうお使いいただけましたか?

今週の人気ランキングをチェックしてみてください。
「人気商品を見る」と送ってくださいね!

【最終案内】初回クーポンの期限が近づいています!

クーポンコード: __COUPON_CODE__

お見逃しなく!

この機会にぜひ!

steps.messageContent:
ご購入ありがとうございます!

__SHOP_NAME__をご利用いただきありがとうございました。
商品の発送準備を進めております。

発送完了後にお知らせいたしますね!
